channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Auto mode lets Claude Code decide, safely, to cut interruptions. AI can run long tasks with guardrails, not just prompts. ⚡ https://Blockchain.News/news/anthropic-claude-code-auto-mode-launch #AI #Code #DevTools

item.title: Moda’s AI deck moves from “generate” to hands-on layout mastery. 3-agent design, a custom DSL, pixel-aware reasoning. 📐 https://Blockchain.News/news/moda-deploys-multi-agent-ai-system-professional-design-automation #AI #DesignTech #Moda
item.description: Moda’s AI deck moves from “generate” to hands-on layout mastery. 3-agent design, a custom DSL, pixel-aware reasoning. 📐 https://Blockchain.News/news/moda-deploys-multi-agent-ai-system-professional-design-automation #AI #DesignTech #Moda

item.title: BNB stakers mint 177% in 15 months—price gains plus mega rewards. The real alpha? Launchpool + airdrops. 🔥 https://Blockchain.News/news/bnb-holders-177-percent-returns-binance-rewards-launchpool-airdrops #crypto #BNB #airdrops
